'''鈭歫-w-dh''' ('''kajawadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voxelise|voxelise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voxelise|voxelise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-w-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajawadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijawadh|thijawadh]] || [[word:jijawadh|jijawadh]] || [[word:shijawadh|shijawadh]] || [[word:kijawadh|kijawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujawadh|thuthujawadh]] || [[word:jujujawadh|jujujawadh]] || [[word:shushujawadh|shushujawadh]] || [[word:kukujawadh|kukujawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujawadh|thujawadh]] || [[word:jujawadh|jujawadh]] || [[word:shujawadh|shujawadh]] || [[word:kujawadh|kujawadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujawadh|thujawadh]] || [[word:jujawadh|jujawadh]] || [[word:shujawadh|shujawadh]] || [[word:kujawadh|kujawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejawadh|thejawadh]] || [[word:jejawadh|jejawadh]] || [[word:shejawadh|shejawadh]] || [[word:kejawadh|kejawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojawadh|thothojawadh]] || [[word:jojojawadh|jojojawadh]] || [[word:shoshojawadh|shoshojawadh]] || [[word:kokojawadh|kokojawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojawadh|thojawadh]] || [[word:jojawadh|jojawadh]] || [[word:shojawadh|shojawadh]] || [[word:kojawadh|kojawadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojawadh|thojawadh]] || [[word:jojawadh|jojawadh]] || [[word:shojawadh|shojawadh]] || [[word:kojawadh|kojawadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]] || [[word:jawadh|jawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jawadh|th忙jawadh]] || [[word:j忙jawadh|j忙jawadh]] || [[word:sh忙jawadh|sh忙jawadh]] || [[word:k忙jawadh|k忙jawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajawadh|thathajawadh]] || [[word:jajajawadh|jajajawadh]] || [[word:shashajawadh|shashajawadh]] || [[word:kakajawadh|kakajawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajawadh|thajawadh]] || [[word:jajawadh|jajawadh]] || [[word:shajawadh|shajawadh]] || [[word:kajawadh|kajawadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajawadh|thajawadh]] || [[word:jajawadh|jajawadh]] || [[word:shajawadh|shajawadh]] || [[word:kajawadh|kajawadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajawadh|shajawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajawadh|goshajawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajawadh|gokishajawadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajawadhn眉|shajawadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkn眉|goshajawadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajawadhn眉|gokishajawadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajawadhsh毛|shajawadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajawadhnksh毛|goshajawadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajawadhsh毛|gokishajawadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajawadhro|shajawadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkro|goshajawadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajawadhro|gokishajawadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajawadhmu|shajawadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkmu|goshajawadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajawadhmu|gokishajawadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajawadhsher|shajawadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajawadhnksher|goshajawadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajawadhsher|gokishajawadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajawadhng|shajawadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkng|goshajawadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajawadhng|gokishajawadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajawadhya|shajawadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkya|goshajawadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajawadhya|gokishajawadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajawadhyam|shajawadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkyam|goshajawadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajawadhyam|gokishajawadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajawadhn眉sh毛|shajawadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkn眉sh毛|goshajawadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajawadhn眉sh毛|gokishajawadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajawadhn眉ro|shajawadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkn眉ro|goshajawadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajawadhn眉ro|gokishajawadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajawadhn眉mu|shajawadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkn眉mu|goshajawadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajawadhn眉mu|gokishajawadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajawadhsh毛n眉|shajawadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajawadhnksh毛n眉|goshajawadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajawadhsh毛n眉|gokishajawadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajawadhsh毛ro|shajawadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajawadhnksh毛ro|goshajawadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajawadhsh毛ro|gokishajawadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajawadhsh毛mu|shajawadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajawadhnksh毛mu|goshajawadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajawadhsh毛mu|gokishajawadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajawadhron眉|shajawadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkron眉|goshajawadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajawadhron眉|gokishajawadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajawadhrosh毛|shajawadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkrosh毛|goshajawadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajawadhrosh毛|gokishajawadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajawadhromu|shajawadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkromu|goshajawadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajawadhromu|gokishajawadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajawadhmun眉|shajawadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkmun眉|goshajawadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajawadhmun眉|gokishajawadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajawadhmush毛|shajawadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkmush毛|goshajawadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajawadhmush毛|gokishajawadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajawadhmuro|shajawadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajawadhnkmuro|goshajawadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajawadhmuro|gokishajawadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
